about.subtitle: We're a team of passionate developers and designers dedicated to creating exceptional digital experiences.

story.title: Our Story
paragraphs: Founded with a simple mission, Maystack helps businesses transform ideas into powerful digital solutions.
We specialize in custom web and mobile applications that look polished and deliver real value to clients and users.
Today, we are proud to build clean interfaces, scalable systems, and digital products that help businesses grow.

client.title: Client-Focused
client.desc: Your success is our success. We prioritize your needs and goals in every decision.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We stay ahead of the curve, using modern technologies and thoughtful methods.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We never compromise on quality, delivering robust and reliable solutions.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.desc: We work closely with clients as partners, ensuring transparency throughout.

contactPage.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss how we can help bring your vision to life.
contactPage.asideIntro: Share the idea, timeline, or rough scope. I will keep the next step clear and practical.
contactPage.asideNote: Prefer email? Send the full brief whenever it is ready. Prefer phone? A quick call works beautifully for early ideas.

contact.title: I usually reply within 24 hours.
contact.heroText: Send the idea, the goal, or the messy sketch. MayStack can turn it into a clean interface and reusable frontend.
